text:
These men were the candidates to become the Homunculus Wrath and future Fuhrer King Bradley. After numerous failed attempts to create Wrath, one was a success.

Personality

The candidates were completely loyal to the Gold-Toothed Doctor (the man who raised them).

Abilities

The King Bradley candidates were all enhanced to superhuman levels and possessed sword-fighting skill similar to King Bradley himself - though they were overall inferior to the Fuhrer in overall capabilities.
